---
title: "unified_test"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-20"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(cmdstanr)
library(posterior)
library(MASS) 
```


```{r}
# Functions needed from simulation doc:
# - simulate_data()
# - make_sim_unified_data()  ← new one I just wrote
# - evaluate_recovery()

# Models needed — already compiled so just load:
mod_cva      <- cmdstan_model("cva_model.stan")
mod_composite <- cmdstan_model("composite_model.stan")
mod_tvaas    <- cmdstan_model("tvaas_model.stan")
mod_unified  <- cmdstan_model("unified_model.stan")  # ← new
```


```{r}
simulate_data <- function(
    n_teachers = 20,
    n_students = 200,
    n_grades   = 3,
    n_schools  = 4,
    scenario   = "A",
    rho        = 0.7,
    seed       = 141229
) {
  set.seed(seed)

  # ── True effects ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  theta_true     <- rnorm(n_teachers)
  school_effects <- rnorm(n_schools, 0, 0.3)

  # ── School assignments ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  # Teachers evenly distributed across schools
  teacher_school <- rep(1:n_schools, length.out = n_teachers)

  # Students evenly distributed across schools
  student_school <- rep(1:n_schools, length.out = n_students)

  # ── Student-teacher assignments (within school) ─────────────────────────────
  assign_one_grade <- function() {
    assignment <- integer(n_students)
    for (s in 1:n_schools) {
      school_students <- which(student_school == s)
      school_teachers <- which(teacher_school == s)
      assignment[school_students] <- sample(
        rep(school_teachers, length.out = length(school_students))
      )
    }
    assignment
  }

  teacher_assign <- matrix(
    replicate(n_grades, assign_one_grade()),
    nrow = n_students, ncol = n_grades
  )

  # ── Student parameters ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (scenario == "A") {
    # Each student has own params, stable across grades
    alpha_i   <- rlnorm(n_students, log(0.2), log(2) / 2)
    a_i       <- rlnorm(n_students, log(1.0), log(2) / 2)
    alpha_mat <- matrix(rep(alpha_i, n_grades), nrow = n_students)
    a_mat     <- matrix(rep(a_i,     n_grades), nrow = n_students)

  } else if (scenario == "B") {
    # All students share one set of parameters
    alpha_shared <- rlnorm(1, log(0.2), log(2) / 2)
    a_shared     <- rlnorm(1, log(1.0), log(2) / 2)
    alpha_mat    <- matrix(alpha_shared, nrow = n_students, ncol = n_grades)
    a_mat        <- matrix(a_shared,     nrow = n_students, ncol = n_grades)

  } else if (scenario == "C") {
    # New params drawn for every student-grade combination
    alpha_mat <- matrix(
      rlnorm(n_students * n_grades, log(0.2), log(2) / 2),
      nrow = n_students
    )
    a_mat <- matrix(
      rlnorm(n_students * n_grades, log(1.0), log(2) / 2),
      nrow = n_students
    )
  }

  # ── AR(1) cross-wave covariance structure ───────────────────────────────────
  # Captures persistent student ability across grades — gives TVAAS
  # something to learn that CVA/SWVAM cannot exploit
  Sigma_base <- rho^abs(outer(1:n_grades, 1:n_grades, "-"))

  # ── Generate outcomes ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  rows <- vector("list", n_students * n_grades)
  k    <- 1L

  for (i in seq_len(n_students)) {
    j_vec <- teacher_assign[i, ]

    # School effect from first grade teacher (stable within school)
    s <- teacher_school[j_vec[1]]

    # Mean vector across grades — teacher + school
    mu_vec <- sapply(seq_len(n_grades), function(g) {
      alpha_mat[i, g] * theta_true[j_vec[g]] + school_effects[s]
    })

    # Student-specific precision scales covariance
    # Use first grade a_i as the baseline precision
    sigma_i <- 1.0 / sqrt(a_mat[i, 1])
    Sigma_i <- Sigma_base * sigma_i^2

    # Draw all grades jointly — this is the key change for TVAAS
    scores_i <- MASS::mvrnorm(1, mu_vec, Sigma_i)

    for (g in seq_len(n_grades)) {
      rows[[k]] <- list(
        student_id = i,
        teacher_id = j_vec[g],
        school_id  = s,
        grade      = g,
        y          = scores_i[g]
      )
      k <- k + 1L
    }
  }

  data <- bind_rows(rows)

  list(
    data           = data,
    theta_true     = theta_true,
    school_effects = school_effects,
    teacher_school = teacher_school,
    student_school = student_school
  )
}
```





```{r}
make_sim_unified_data <- function(df, n_teachers, n_students, n_grades) {

  # Wide score matrix
  Y_wide <- df |>
    arrange(student_id, grade) |>
    pivot_wider(id_cols=student_id, names_from=grade,
                values_from=y, names_prefix="grade_") |>
    arrange(student_id) |>
    dplyr::select(-student_id) |>
    as.matrix()

  # Wide teacher matrix
  T_wide <- df |>
    arrange(student_id, grade) |>
    pivot_wider(id_cols=student_id, names_from=grade,
                values_from=teacher_id, names_prefix="grade_") |>
    arrange(student_id) |>
    dplyr::select(-student_id) |>
    as.matrix()

  # Wide peer achievement matrix
  peer <- df |>
    group_by(school_id, grade) |>
    mutate(P = mean(y)) |>
    ungroup()

  P_wide <- peer |>
    arrange(student_id, grade) |>
    pivot_wider(id_cols=student_id, names_from=grade,
                values_from=P, names_prefix="grade_") |>
    arrange(student_id) |>
    dplyr::select(-student_id) |>
    as.matrix()

  # Student covariates X (dummy for simulation)
  X_mat <- matrix(0.0, nrow=n_students, ncol=1L)

  # School covariates S (school membership)
  S_mat <- matrix(as.numeric(
    df |> distinct(teacher_id) |> arrange(teacher_id) |>
    left_join(df |> distinct(teacher_id, school_id), by="teacher_id") |>
    pull(school_id)
  ), ncol=1)

  # Observation mask — all observed in simulation
  obs_mask  <- matrix(1L, nrow=n_students, ncol=n_grades)
  n_obs_vec <- rep(n_grades, n_students)

  # Replace NAs
  Y_wide[is.na(Y_wide)] <- 0
  T_wide[is.na(T_wide)] <- 0L
  P_wide[is.na(P_wide)] <- mean(P_wide, na.rm=TRUE)

  list(
    N          = n_students,
    J          = n_teachers,
    G          = n_grades,
    K          = ncol(X_mat),
    L          = ncol(S_mat),
    Y          = Y_wide,
    X          = X_mat,
    P          = P_wide,
    S          = S_mat,
    teacher_id = T_wide,
    obs        = obs_mask,
    n_obs      = n_obs_vec
  )
}
```


```{r}
evaluate_recovery <- function(theta_estimated, theta_true) {
  # Correlation with true teacher quality
  r <- cor(theta_estimated, theta_true, use = "complete.obs")

  # Proportion correctly assigned to quality quartile (Kim Table 2)
  q_breaks_true <- quantile(theta_true,      probs = 0:4 / 4)
  q_breaks_est  <- quantile(theta_estimated, probs = 0:4 / 4)

  true_q <- cut(theta_true,      breaks = q_breaks_true,
                labels = 1:4, include.lowest = TRUE)
  est_q  <- cut(theta_estimated, breaks = q_breaks_est,
                labels = 1:4, include.lowest = TRUE)

  pct_correct <- mean(true_q == est_q, na.rm = TRUE)

  list(correlation = round(r, 4), pct_correct_quartile = round(pct_correct, 4))
}
```







```{r}
mod_unified <- cmdstan_model("unified_model.stan")

# Quick test — scenario A, 4 grades
sim <- simulate_data(n_teachers=10, n_students=100, n_grades=4,
                     n_schools=2, scenario="A", seed=1)

system.time(
  fit_unified <- mod_unified$sample(
    data        = make_sim_unified_data(sim$data, 10, 100, 4),
    seed        = 1, chains = 1,
    iter_warmup = 300, iter_sampling = 500,
    refresh     = 200
  )
)
```




```{r}
# Convergence
fit_unified$diagnostic_summary()

# Check key parameters
fit_unified$summary(c("tau_theta", "theta_raw", "alpha", "a", 
                       "sigma_wave", "L_corr")) |>
  filter(rhat > 1.01 | ess_bulk < 400)

# Teacher effects
fit_unified$summary("theta") |> head(10)
```
```{r}
fit_cva <- mod_cva$sample(
  data          = make_sim_cva_data(sim$data, 10),
  seed=1, chains=1, iter_warmup=300, iter_sampling=500, refresh=200)

fit_composite <- mod_composite$sample(
  data          = make_sim_composite_data(sim$data, 10, 100, sim$teacher_school),
  seed=1, chains=1, iter_warmup=300, iter_sampling=500, refresh=200)

fit_tvaas <- mod_tvaas$sample(
  data          = make_sim_tvaas_data(sim$data, 10, 100, 4),
  seed=1, chains=1, iter_warmup=300, iter_sampling=500, refresh=200)

```



```{r}
# Then compare
theta_unified   <- fit_unified$summary("theta")$mean
theta_cva       <- fit_cva$summary("theta")$mean
theta_composite <- fit_composite$summary("theta")$mean
theta_tvaas     <- fit_tvaas$summary("theta")$mean

cat("CVA:       ", round(cor(theta_cva,       sim$theta_true), 3), "\n")
cat("Composite: ", round(cor(theta_composite, sim$theta_true), 3), "\n")
cat("TVAAS:     ", round(cor(theta_tvaas,     sim$theta_true), 3), "\n")
cat("Unified:   ", round(cor(theta_unified,   sim$theta_true), 3), "\n")
```

```{r}
results_unified <- list()

for (s in 1:5) {
  message(sprintf("Seed %d...", s))
  
  sim_s <- simulate_data(n_teachers=10, n_students=100,
                         n_grades=4, n_schools=2,
                         scenario="C", seed=s)

  fit_cva_s <- mod_cva$sample(
    data=make_sim_cva_data(sim_s$data, 10),
    seed=s, chains=1, iter_warmup=300, iter_sampling=500, refresh=0,
    show_messages=FALSE)

  fit_comp_s <- mod_composite$sample(
    data=make_sim_composite_data(sim_s$data, 10, 100, sim_s$teacher_school),
    seed=s, chains=1, iter_warmup=300, iter_sampling=500, refresh=0,
    show_messages=FALSE)

  fit_tvaas_s <- mod_tvaas$sample(
    data=make_sim_tvaas_data(sim_s$data, 10, 100, 4),
    seed=s, chains=1, iter_warmup=300, iter_sampling=500, refresh=0,
    show_messages=FALSE)

  fit_unified_s <- mod_unified$sample(
    data=make_sim_unified_data(sim_s$data, 10, 100, 4),
    seed=s, chains=1, iter_warmup=300, iter_sampling=500, refresh=0,
    show_messages=FALSE)

  results_unified[[s]] <- tibble(
    seed      = s,
    cva       = cor(fit_cva_s$summary("theta")$mean,     sim_s$theta_true),
    composite = cor(fit_comp_s$summary("theta")$mean,    sim_s$theta_true),
    tvaas     = cor(fit_tvaas_s$summary("theta")$mean,   sim_s$theta_true),
    unified   = cor(fit_unified_s$summary("theta")$mean, sim_s$theta_true)
  )
  
  message(sprintf("  CVA=%.3f  Composite=%.3f  TVAAS=%.3f  Unified=%.3f",
                  results_unified[[s]]$cva,
                  results_unified[[s]]$composite,
                  results_unified[[s]]$tvaas,
                  results_unified[[s]]$unified))
}

bind_rows(results_unified) |>
  summarise(across(cva:unified, ~round(mean(.), 3)))
```

```{r}
tibble(
  model = c("CVA", "Composite", "TVAAS", "Unified"),
  correlation = c(0.521, 0.638, 0.774, 0.840)
) |>
  mutate(model = factor(model, levels = c("CVA", "Composite", "TVAAS", "Unified"))) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = model, y = correlation, fill = model)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(correlation, 3)), vjust = -0.5, size = 3.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "CVA"       = "#378ADD",
    "Composite" = "#D85A30",
    "TVAAS"     = "#7F77DD",
    "Unified"   = "#1D9E75"
  )) +
  labs(
    title    = "Teacher effect recovery across models",
    subtitle = "Mean correlation with true θ across 5 simulation trials\nScenario A, 4 grades, rho = 0.7",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Correlation with true θ"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank())
```
